title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY at 159.19 — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: EUR/USD
text: EUR/USD holding above 1.1711, with ECB on hold and market bias towards hold; watch for potential rate divergence impact on the pair.

title: CFTC — EUR
text: EUR net long positioning at 77.3% long, with leveraged funds net long +1,029 contracts; watch for potential squeeze risk.

title: Risk Regime
text: VIX at 20.0 signals elevated volatility — not a risk-on environment; watch for potential impact on FX markets.

title: USD/JPY vs VIX
text: USD/JPY vs VIX correlation break at +1.38σ, indicating JPY no longer acting as safe haven; watch for potential regime shift implications.
